regulation_name: Health Products Act - Medical Devices
regulation_name_en: Health Products Act - Medical Devices
regulation_name_zh: 健康产品法 - 医疗器械
content: The Health Products Act provides the legal framework for the regulation of health products in Singapore, including medical devices. It covers product registration, dealer licensing, and post-market surveillance.

regulation_name: GN-12: Guidance on Medical Device Product Registration
regulation_name_en: GN-12: Guidance on Medical Device Product Registration
regulation_name_zh: GN-12: 医疗器械产品注册指南
content: This guidance document provides detailed information on the product registration process for medical devices in Singapore, including device classification, registration routes, and documentation requirements.

regulation_name: Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Act (PMD Act)
regulation_name_en: Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Act (PMD Act)
regulation_name_zh: 药品医疗器械法 (PMD法)
content: The PMD Act is the fundamental law governing pharmaceuticals and medical devices in Japan. It covers marketing authorization, quality management, and post-market safety measures.

regulation_name: QMS Ministerial Ordinance
regulation_name_en: QMS Ministerial Ordinance
regulation_name_zh: QMS 省令
content: The Ministerial Ordinance on Quality Management System for Medical Devices establishes requirements for QMS conformity assessment and manufacturing control.

regulation_name: Therapeutic Goods Act 1989
regulation_name_en: Therapeutic Goods Act 1989
regulation_name_zh: 治疗用品法 1989
content: The Therapeutic Goods Act 1989 provides the legal framework for the regulation of therapeutic goods in Australia, including medical devices.

regulation_name: Medical Devices Regulations 2002
regulation_name_en: Medical Devices Regulations 2002
regulation_name_zh: 医疗器械法规 2002
content: The Medical Devices Regulations 2002 specify requirements for the inclusion of medical devices in the Australian Register of Therapeutic Goods (ARTG).

regulation_name: Medical Devices Regulations (SOR/98-282)
regulation_name_en: Medical Devices Regulations (SOR/98-282)
regulation_name_zh: 医疗器械法规 (SOR/98-282)
content: The Medical Devices Regulations establish requirements for the sale and importation of medical devices in Canada, including device classification, licensing, and quality system requirements.

regulation_name: Guidance Document: ISO 13485 Quality Management System
regulation_name_en: Guidance Document: ISO 13485 Quality Management System
regulation_name_zh: 指导文件：ISO 13485质量管理体系
content: This guidance document explains how Health Canada interprets and applies ISO 13485 for medical device quality management systems in Canada.
